description: Social-network (Facebook-like) legacy aggregate targets: PUBLISHED AGGREGATE statistics only (no individual-level data). NOTE: the Facebook friend-degree distribution is NOT a clean power-law (Ugander et al. 2011), so degree_tail_exponent is deliberately OMITTED rather than fabricated. Citation research pass 2026-07-11: named-paper identifiers were verified against arXiv/dblp/official pages (see per-target source_status); numeric values were NOT independently re-verified, and the full metadata schema (population, date range, source hash, tolerance rationale) remains incomplete, so every target stays kind=unsupported and comparison gates stay closed.

clustering.source: High average clustering ~0.6 for the Facebook friendship graph (Ugander, Karrer, Backstrom & Marlow 2011, 'The Anatomy of the Facebook Social Graph')
clustering.verification_note: Ugander et al. 2011 verified via arXiv:1111.4503 on the retrieval date; the abstract confirms 'surprisingly dense' neighborhood clustering but states no numeric coefficient -- the ~0.6 figure is from the paper body, not re-verified here.

diurnal_peak_hour.source: Social-network engagement peaks in the evening ~19-21h local time (circadian engagement studies)
diurnal_peak_hour.verification_note: No named, verifiable publication behind this range claim; kept only as an unsupported legacy diagnostic anchor.

diurnal_trough_hour.source: Overnight trough ~03-05h local time (circadian engagement studies)
diurnal_trough_hour.verification_note: No named, verifiable publication behind this range claim; kept only as an unsupported legacy diagnostic anchor.

posts_per_agent_day.source: Heavy-tailed; most users post < 1x/day (platform usage aggregates)
posts_per_agent_day.verification_note: No named, verifiable publication behind this range claim; kept only as an unsupported legacy diagnostic anchor.

ad_ctr.verification_note: No named, verifiable publication behind this range claim; kept only as an unsupported legacy diagnostic anchor.

appeal_grant_rate.source: Content reinstatement on appeal varies ~10-30% (Meta transparency reports / Oversight Board)
appeal_grant_rate.verification_note: No named, verifiable publication behind this range claim; kept only as an unsupported legacy diagnostic anchor.
